title: Alliance Group, B&F Ltd, Masters Ltd and C&M Ltd
text:
NOTICE OF APPLICATION FOR APPROVAL OF A TRANSACTION IN JERSEY
Applicant(s): Purchaser: Alliance Group Holdings Inc
Seller / Targets: Brocken and Fitzpatrick Limited; Masters
Scaffolding Limited; C&M Scaffolding Limited
Proposed Transaction: The proposed transaction involves the sale and purchase
of the entire issued share capital of the Targets.
Industries Involved Scaffolding services to the residential, commercial and
public sectors
The Jersey Competition Regulatory Authority (JCRA) invites comments regarding the
proposed transaction. The deadline for comments is 5pm on 12 January 2026. Please
send any comments by e-mail to competition@jcra.je, clearly marked ‘C-086- Alliance
Group, B&F Ltd, Masters Ltd and C&M Ltd’. A public version of the merger application
form is available on request.
19 December 2025
parties: Alliance Group Holdings Inc / Brocken and Fitzpatrick Limited; Masters Scaffolding Limited; C&M Scaffolding Limited
